searchDocs.title: Permission​
searchDocs.content: </> type Permission = string | "RequireAll" | {Permission} The type definition for the 'Permission' callback parameter of HasPermission:Check

searchDocs.title: Check​
searchDocs.content: </> type Check = ( player: Player , args: {string} ) → boolean The type definition for the 'Check' callback parameter of HasPermission:Register

searchDocs.title: Check​
searchDocs.content: </> HasPermission:Check( player: Player ,-- The player to check permission: Permission-- The permission to evaluate ) → boolean-- Whether the player has the permission Checks if a player has a given permission. Delegates to eithertableCheck or stringCheck based on the type of permission. Use '!' before a check name to check if the permission is NOT granted.

searchDocs.title: Exists​
searchDocs.content: </> HasPermission:Exists( name: Name-- The name of the check ) → boolean Returns true if a permission check

searchDocs.title: Register​
searchDocs.content: </> HasPermission:Register( name: Name,-- The name of the check callback: Check-- The function to call for the permission check which should return a boolean ) → boolean-- Whether the permission check has been registered Registers a new permission check Errors if a check with same name already exists

searchDocs.title: Unregister​
searchDocs.content: </> HasPermission:Unregister( name: Name-- The name of the check ) → () Unregisters a permission check used against players.
